ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the clothing item */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the clothing item is designed for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_color FOREIGN KEY ("color") REFERENCES color_options ("color_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., S, M, L, XL) */,
  "bust" INTEGER /* Bust measurement in cm */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in cm */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Hips measurement in cm */,
  "dress_length" INTEGER /* Dresses length in cm */,
  "sleeve_length" INTEGER /* Sleeve length in cm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item in inventory */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size associated with the clothing item */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the item in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Quantity at which to reorder the item */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last stock update */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Dresses, Tops, Bottoms) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item sold */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the sale */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, associate, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last user login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier fulfilling the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date of the order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was returned */,
  "quantity_returned" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item being returned */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who processed the return */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who returned the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales for the day */,
  "total_returns" REAL /* Total returns for the day */,
  "net_sales" REAL /* Net sales calculated as total sales minus total returns */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category of items in the report */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of items in the report */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes_by_category" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "default_bust" INTEGER /* Default bust measurement for the size in the category */,
  "default_waist" INTEGER /* Default waist measurement for the size in the category */,
  "default_hips" INTEGER /* Default hips measurement for the size in the category */,
  "default_dress_length" INTEGER /* Default dress length for the size in the category */,
  "default_sleeve_length" INTEGER /* Default sleeve length for the size in the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id", "size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_options" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Hex code for the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)
